case_title: ABCO MECHANICAL CONTRACTORS INC VS. R3 BUILDERS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,295.75 FILED BY ABCO MECHANICAL CONTRACTORS INC AS TO DEFENDANT R3 BUILDERS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-17-2011 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ($55 FEE FOR SERVICE) SERVED FEB-09-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT R3 BUILDERS
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-17-2011 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ABCO MECHANICAL CONTRACTORS INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT R3 BUILDERS $5,295.75 PRINCIPAL, $130.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,425.75, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ABCO MECHANICAL CONTRACTORS INC
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT R3 BUILDERS
